ingredients_text: Noodles 83,7% (WHEAT flour, refined palm oil (refined palm oil, antioxidant E319), salt, acidity regulators: E452, E501, E500, thickener: E412, colour: E101), Seasoning Oil 6,0% (Refined palm oil (refined palm oil, antioxidant E319), chili, garlic, shallot, paprika), Seasoning powder 4,7% ( Salt, sugar, flavouring (contains SOYBEAN, GLUTEN, CELERY), flavour enhancers: E621, E631, E627, onion, garlic, anticaking agent: E551), Sweet Soy Sauce 3,6% (Sugar, water, salt, WHEAT, SOYBEAN, spices, SESAME oil), Fried Shallot 1,2% (Shallot, refined palm oil (refined palm oil, antioxidant E319)), Chili powder 0,8%.
